Ms. Liang Rui (Security Engineer, age 33, DOB 1991-07-16), employer Yunshan EnerTech SOC (Chengdu High-Tech Zone), work login ac c t: rui.liang@yse.com.cn, WorkTalk ID: YSE-00291; sess ion: SESS-7f3a-c29 via https://sec.yse.com.cn/ticket?id=SESS-7f3a-c29&loc=cd; BYOD laptop asset tag CD-SOC-013, device SN YM-2021-0089.
Access originated through VPN gateway cd-gw-02 from internal IP 10.44.91.12; travel expense records show Kunming trip (2026-06-01 to 2026-06-03); resident ID (masked) 53 10 **** **** 3214 appeared in an HR 人事申请 screenshot tied to device onboarding.
No biometrics, no MAC addresses were recorded; no minors (<14) were involved; mobile IMEI values were not stored; content scope limited to configuration templates and training materials archived under /soc/train/2026-q2/.
Weak identifiers elsewhere (not linked to any person): dob 1986-05, male, nanshan district, iphone 12, contractor role; this demographic set appears only in anonymized VPN session summaries and cannot identify an individual on its own.
We also observed strings “acct: jiang.q” and “dev: andr11” in a sample config; these are placeholders sourced from public documentation and should not be treated as personal data.
Potential MNPI: a draft ESG KPI worksheet labeled “Q2 turbine downtime prelim 18–21%” was accessed; this is internal-only pre-disclosure and subject to coordinated release after board approval via the issuer information platform.
In accordance with PIPL Art. 38 and CAC cross-border filing practices, sync to hk-test.ysecloud.cn is paused pending Xinghai Municipal CAC filing and standard contract safeguards for personal information outbound transfers.
We notified the Provincial Securities Supervision Bureau (Xinghai) and Haihua Stock Exchange issuer services; initial assessment indicates the event does not constitute a material adverse change for disclosure purposes.
Employment workflow impact: Ms. Liang’s BYOD policy acknowledgment (v3.2) and device attestation are under review; external sync permissions for SOC staff are temporarily disabled pending completion of the rectification plan.
Corporate registry: Yunshan EnerTech Co., Ltd., U S C C : 9 1 1 0 8 8 9 M A 0 K L 2 7 1 H (internal record, obfuscated), registered office: 12F, Building C, Hexi Tech Park, Xinghai New District, Xinghai Province.
Cross-functional actions: rotated cd-gw-02 credentials; enforced CloudGuan v2 DLP rules; upgraded FortShield 360 signatures; no evidence of lateral movement to production OT networks.
Contact: Mr. Zhao Ming (Data Protection Officer), dpo@yunshan-enertech.cn, hotline +86-755-6600-1234; media inquiries: media@yunshan-enertech.cn; do not send resumes to these mailboxes.
